purpose: Evaluate the PR-167 JRA wider snapshot against the existing C / B / B+ / A rank rules. This file records the gate result only and does not change rank data.

snapshot_scope.reason_full_month_claim_not_allowed: The snapshot verifies seven selected meetings, not every JRA meeting in January 2026.

c_gate.reason: Official JRA source URLs and meeting dates exist for the verified snapshot scope.

b_gate.reason: Each verified meeting has source-derived first_race_time, last_race_time, and race_count from verified rows.

b_plus_gate.reason: Each verified meeting has source-verified race_number and race_time rows from official JRA calendar pages.

a_gate.reason: A-rank public racecard/detail UI and richer racecard handling are not implemented in this work.

decision.recommended_next_pr: Add a scoped JRA B+ rank update for the verified snapshot records only. Do not claim full-month coverage.

promotion_boundaries: Do not mark JRA as A-rank from this evidence.
Do not claim all January 2026 JRA meetings are verified.
Do not claim June 2026 JRA coverage from this January snapshot.
Do not add public A-rank detail UI in the rank update PR.
Only the verified snapshot scope may move to B+ in the next PR.

forward_schedule.condition: Use if this promotion gate is accepted.
forward_schedule.goal: Reflect B+ for the verified JRA snapshot scope only.

forward_schedule.condition: Use only if the scoped B+ update is blocked during implementation.
forward_schedule.goal: Record why JRA remains unpromoted and move to NAR.

forward_schedule.condition: Use after a scoped B+ update.
forward_schedule.goal: Check rank, time, races, details, and source display for the scoped JRA records.

forward_schedule.condition: Use if JRA promotion remains blocked.
